request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：企業管治 -> Corporate Governance | 財務及營運回顧 -> Financial and Operating Review
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2020 p65 [contents_like] (无标题)
-   2022 p15 [dense_narrative] (无标题)
-   2022 p19 [dense_narrative] (无标题)

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 19,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b3",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集",
      "current_translation": "rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to demonstrate a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        125.17,
        521.57,
        137.12
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b5",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3",
      "current_translation": "Excluding the subdued sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong, new business value in the Group's other segments recovered strongly in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.687,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        141.17,
        521.57,
        153.13
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b8",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "期高出15%。",
      "current_translation": "The Group's new business momentum continued to be strong in 2021, with new business value in the first two months 15% higher than the same period in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "overflow",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 7,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        189.18,
        122.08,
        201.13
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b9",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "截至2020年12月31日的內涵價值權益創下新高為671.85億美元，於派付股息19.97億美元之前增加52.77億美元，",
      "current_translation": "Embedded value equity as at 31 December 2020 reached a new high of US$67.185 billion, increasing by US$5.277 billion before the payment of dividends of US$1.997 billion, driven by embedded value operating profit of US$7.243 billion which offset the impact of declining government bond yields.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.466,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 61,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        221.18,
        521.57,
        233.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "原因在於內涵價值營運溢利72.43億美元抵銷了政府債券收益率下降的影響。內涵價值營運溢利包括來自正面營",
      "current_translation": "Embedded value operating profit includes positive operating variances of US$549 million, reflecting the continued positive experience of our overall operations compared to our embedded value assumptions.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.673,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        237.19,
        521.53,
        249.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "運差異5.49億美元，原因在於與我們的內涵價值假設相比，我們的整體經驗持續維持正面。",
      "current_translation": "Embedded value operating profit includes positive operating variances of US$549 million, reflecting the continued positive experience of our overall operations compared to our embedded value assumptions.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.545,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 42,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        253.19,
        435.51,
        265.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，",
      "current_translation": "Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove operating profit after tax growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, while maintaining the operating profit margin at 16.9%.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.627,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        68.03,
        285.19,
        521.57,
        297.14
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b14",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投",
      "current_translation": "Operating profit after tax growth benefited from significantly positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the impact of lower yields on new fixed income investments and reduced assumptions for long-term equity investment returns.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.564,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        317.2,
        521.47,
        329.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b15",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此",
      "current_translation": "As expected, the exceptionally positive medical claims experience reported in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see positive contributions from this source to operating profit after tax growth.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.631,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        333.2,
        521.44,
        345.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b17",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。",
      "current_translation": "With AIA Thailand's lapse experience normalizing, renewal rates improved in the second half, with the Group's renewal rate at 95%.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 16,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        365.2,
        205.1,
        377.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b18",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "產生的基本自由盈餘為58.43億美元，增長了7%，是由我們有效保單組合的持續增長和我們對此積極管理所帶",
      "current_translation": "Generated free surplus of US$5.843 billion increased by 7%, driven by continued growth in our in-force portfolio and our active management of it, which was sufficient to offset the impact of lower expected investment returns.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.621,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        68.02,
        397.21,
        521.55,
        409.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b20",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "19.97億美元後，自由盈餘為134.73億美元。",
      "current_translation": "As at 31 December 2020, the Group's financial position remained very strong, with free surplus of US$13.473 billion after the payment of dividends of US$1.997 billion.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 25,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        429.21,
        245.79,
        441.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "團當地資本總和法覆蓋率，作為衡量本集團監管償付能力的主要指標。",
      "current_translation": "Going forward, we will disclose the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency position.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.548,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 31,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        493.22,
        353.76,
        505.17
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。",
      "current_translation": "This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, enabling the Group to capture future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.523,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 34,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        557.23,
        381.43,
        569.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b27",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "我們仍然對友邦保險在整個亞洲地區的業務機會充滿信心。我們將繼續專注於投資資本，以實現具盈利的新業務",
      "current_translation": "We remain confident in AIA's business opportunities across the Asian region. We will continue to focus on deploying capital to achieve profitable new business growth, leveraging our competitive advantages while maintaining prudent financial management and delivering long-term shareholder value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.465,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        589.23,
        521.46,
        601.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p19_b28",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "增長，並運用我們的競爭優勢，同時維持審慎的財務管理和實現長期股東價值。",
      "current_translation": "We remain confident in AIA's business opportunities across the Asian region. We will continue to focus on deploying capital to achieve profitable new business growth, leveraging our competitive advantages while maintaining prudent financial management and delivering long-term shareholder value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 35,
      "bbox": [
        68.01,
        605.23,
        390.66,
        617.18
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    }
  ]
}
